kcal_range_per_100ml.note: Lemon juice (22 kcal) to grape tiroush (69 kcal); grape concentrate (85 kcal)

enrichment_notes: Ingredient text available only for OFF-matched products (9). French ingredient text on barcode 7290001247068 (ספרינג תות) — OFF record from French market import.
FDC generic references applied by juice type classification. Most granular: grape tiroush (grape_tiroush), lemon juice (lemon), cold-pressed (cold_pressed_oj/cp).
Fruit content % extracted from label name text for 8 products. The Israeli '100% פרי' label = juice_100; 'נקטר' = nectar with estimated 30-50% fruit from FDC reference.
NOVA 1: 4 products (3 cold-pressed + 1 fresh-squeezed סחוט). NOVA 3: standard 100% juices. NOVA 4: nectars and fruit drinks with added sugar or additives.
